name: DOW INC.
business: Dow is one of the world's leading materials science companies, serving customers in high-growth markets such as packaging, infrastructure, mobility and consumer applications. Dow operates manufacturing sites in 29 countries and employs approximately 34,600 people. Dow delivered sales of approximately $40 billion in 2025.

exposures.sentence: This includes applications for appliances; furniture; bedding; footwear; refrigerated transport; building insulation panels; electric vehicle battery assembly; automotive seat cushions and acoustics; and aircraft deicing fluids.

The Industrial Solutions business further advanced applications in data center cooling with DOWFROST TM LC heat transfer fluid, which is specifically formulated for liquid-cooled, direct-to-chip applications
investments in innovation for growth are focused on addressing market needs such as thermal management in high-performance computing and artificial intelligence applications
renewable energy applications such as wind and solar (photovoltaic) power
Dow continued to collaborate with X-energy, a nuclear energy innovation company, to advance the design of the previously announced advanced small modular reactor nuclear project
products and services for energy markets including exploration, production, transmission, refining, mining, gas processing and carbon capture
UCARSOL Amines and related technology for carbon capture
global development of electrical transmission and distribution infrastructure
transform plastic waste and other forms of alternative feedstock to commercialize 3 million metric tons of circular and renewable solutions annually by 2030

Disruption of the Company's information technology, data security, and other operating or third-party systems, including disruption of the ability to safely and reliably operate the Company's facilities

catalysts.event: Completion of world-scale polyethylene unit on U.S. Gulf Coast
catalysts.sentence: Construction of a world-scale polyethylene unit on the U.S. Gulf Coast, based on Dow's proprietary process technologies, to meet consumer-driven demand in specialty packaging, health and hygiene, and industrial and consumer packaging applications, was completed in 2025.

catalysts.event: Mura advanced recycling plant begins continuous supply
catalysts.sentence: The first Mura plant in the United Kingdom completed commissioning of its 20,000 metric ton advanced recycling facility in the fourth quarter of 2024 and began initial feedstock production in 2025, with continuous supply expected in 2026

catalysts.event: Xycle advanced recycling plant fully operational
catalysts.sentence: The facility is expected to be fully operational by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Submission of construction permit application for SMR nuclear project
catalysts.sentence: submitting a construction permit application to the Nuclear Regulatory Commission in 2025.

catalysts.event: Shutdown of ethylene cracker in Böhlen, Germany
catalysts.sentence: Dow plans to shut down an ethylene cracker in B hlen, Germany, by the end of 2027.

catalysts.event: Shutdown of CAV assets in Schkopau, Germany
catalysts.sentence: Dow plans to shut down certain CAV assets in Schkopau, Germany, by the end of 2027.

catalysts.event: Shutdown of siloxanes operations in Barry, UK
catalysts.sentence: Consumer Solutions will shut down its basics siloxanes operations in Barry, United Kingdom, by mid-year 2026.
expects the first and second phases of the project to start up by the end of 2029 and 2030, respectively.
mechanically completed investments in Europe and will begin product qualification and ramp-up activities in early 2026.

catalysts.event: Approval of Transform to Outperform program
catalysts.sentence: On January 26, 2026, the Dow Inc. Board approved Transform to Outperform, a comprehensive set of actions designed to improve near-term Operating EBITDA
